analysis_summary: **Crypto Market: Sentiment & 24h Outlook** BTC is at **$69,955.78 (-3.7%)** with **$1,616M** spot volume, ETH **$2,045.22 (-3.8%)** on **$816M**, and SOL **$86.49 (-5.4%)** on **$289M**—still a de-risking tape with equities weak (**S&P -0.9%**) and volatility sticky (**VIX 22.6**).
